indicators.name: several desks with computers
indicators.rationale: Multiple workstations provide options for setting up a computer workspace.

indicators.name: ergonomic office chairs
indicators.rationale: Ergonomic chairs support long periods of sitting.

indicators.name: task lighting
indicators.rationale: Task lighting is present but not specifically directed at the screens.

indicators.name: open space layout
indicators.rationale: Open space layout can lead to distractions and noise.

indicators.name: artwork on walls
indicators.rationale: Artwork can be distracting and does not contribute to a focused work environment.

reasoning_summary: The scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). While there are multiple workstations and ergonomic chairs, the open space layout and artwork on the walls can lead to distractions and noise, reducing the overall suitability for focused solo work.
